agents.name: strategist
agents.description: Business strategy — evaluates market positioning, competitive landscape, and business viability of decisions
agents.task: Business strategy, market analysis, competitive positioning

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Technical writing — transforms research findings, code, and analysis into clear documents and presentations for the intended audience

agents.name: designer
agents.description: UX/UI design — evaluates user experience, interaction patterns, and how users will experience the product
agents.task: UI/UX design, interaction patterns, user experience

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Content verification — validates accuracy, checks facts, confirms grammar and format of non-code deliverables

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Independent investigation — conducts web searches, gathers evidence, and reports findings with citations

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Testing and verification — tests, verifies, validates stability and security of implementations

agents.name: postdoc
agents.description: Research methodology and synthesis — designs investigation approach, evaluates evidence quality, writes synthesis documents

agents.name: engineer
agents.description: Implementation — writes code, debugs issues, follows specifications from Lead and architect

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Technical design — evaluates How, reviews architecture, advises on implementation approach

skills.name: nx-setup
skills.description: Interactive project setup wizard for Nexus configuration.

skills.name: nx-plan
skills.description: Structured multi-perspective analysis to decompose issues, align on decisions, and produce an enriched plan before execution. Plan only — does not execute.

skills.name: nx-sync
skills.description: Context knowledge synchronization — scans project state and updates .nexus/context/ design documents

skills.name: nx-init
skills.description: Project onboarding — scan, mission, essentials, context generation

capabilities.description: Agent cannot create or modify files in the user's workspace
Agent cannot create new tasks in the Nexus task pipeline
Agent cannot update the state of existing Nexus tasks

categories.description: 분석·자문. 깊은 맥락 유지가 핵심 자산. architect, designer, postdoc, strategist.
실행. 산출물(artifact) 단위로 작업하고 종료. engineer, writer, researcher.
검증. 항상 fresh한 관점에서 독립적으로 검사. tester, reviewer.

resume_tiers.description: 세션 전체를 지속한다. HOW 카테고리 에이전트와 researcher. 맥락 누적이 핵심 자산.
artifact 단위로 지속한다. engineer, writer. 특정 산출물 완성 후 종료.
항상 새로 시작한다. tester, reviewer. 이전 맥락 없이 독립 검증해야 하기 때문.

tags.description: Activates nx-plan skill for structured multi-perspective analysis and decision recording
Activates nx-run skill for task execution with subagent composition
Activates nx-sync skill for .nexus/context/ knowledge synchronization
Records a decision during an active plan session
Stores a lesson or reference to .nexus/memory/
Garbage-collects .nexus/memory/ by merging or removing stale entries
Stores a project rule to .nexus/rules/. [rule:*] supports tag parameter.
